name: frontier_governed_mid
description: Compliance-coverage frontier: governed stack at default PAAP strictness (min_avg_score=0.6). This is the default operating point from the main ablation benchmark. Expected: moderate coverage, zero scope violations, DAR receipts present. Centre point on the compliance-coverage frontier. The main ablation benchmark already produced this result; re-run here for a consistent frontier dataset with the same fixtures and rep count as the other frontier configs.
